item.title: Who Wrote Your Favorite Songs?
item.description: Test your knowledge of some of our songwriters’ biggest hits.

item.title: See Who Insiders Nominated as America’s Greatest Living Songwriters
item.description: We received more than 250 expert ballots. Explore some of them here.

item.title: Cast Your Vote for the Greatest Living American Songwriters
item.description: Times critics, with the help of more than 250 experts, made their list of the 30 greatest living American songwriters. Now it’s your turn to choose.

item.title: The Taylor Swift Interview
item.description: The artist shares stories behind some of her biggest hits, her love of a “rant bridge” and how life in the public eye informs the stories she tells in her songs.

item.title: The Jay-Z Interview
item.description: The artist shares stories behind his famous songs, the writing challenges he sets for himself and how he has sustained a hip-hop career.

item.title: He Was Supposed to Die in Prison, but the Prosecutor Felt Guilty
item.description: Jessie Askew Jr. was sentenced to life without parole for a clumsy armed robbery with an unloaded gun. The man who sent him away was determined to bring him back home.

item.title: Takeaways From The Times’s Interview With Tucker Carlson
item.description: He spoke about the rupture with President Trump and what it portends for the conservative movement. Here are the key moments from our conversation.

item.title: Can I Ask My Brother to Have His Racist Prison Tattoo Removed?
item.description: I know that some tattoo artists will cover white-supremacist tattoos at no cost for those who have disavowed such views.

item.title: For a Certain Kind of Guy, Even a Diaper Bag Needs to Be ‘Tactical’
item.description: How the marketing term turned seemingly everything into a battle-ready product.

item.title: What Does Tucker Carlson Really Believe? I Went to Maine to Find Out.
item.description: The conservative media commentator split with the administration over the war in Iran. Will the breakup last?

item.title: I Regret to Inform You of the Better Face Inside Your Face
item.description: The world has gone crazy for tools and tricks that slim the visage. Is vanity to blame — or something weirder?

item.title: Can the Argentine President’s Deregulatory Frenzy Buoy the Global Right?
item.description: With his signature chain saw, Javier Milei became a MAGA superstar. At home, his state-slashing experiment is on the line.

item.title: The Longevity Secrets Helping Athletes Blow Past the Limits of Age
item.description: With cutting-edge sports medicine and sci-fi gadgetry, more and more athletes are figuring out how to extend their careers.
